mapper.select: select * from board_view bv where bv.bno = #{bno}
select * from board_comment_view bcv where bcv.bno = #{bno}
mapper.update: update board set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, write_update_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: select * from board_reaction where mid = #{id} and bno = #{bno}
mapper.update: update board_reaction set type = #{type} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT count(case when br.`type` = 'like' then 1 end) as likeCount, count(case when br.`type` = 'dislike' then 1 end) as dislikeCount FROM board b LEFT OUTER JOIN board_reaction br ON b.bno = br.bno WHERE b.bno = #{bno}
